response.justification: Exceptional full-stack candidate with 15+ years of continuous senior-level experience across the core tech stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker, Kubernetes). Current role explicitly involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks, directly addressing the job's emerging AI requirements. Demonstrates strong engineering discipline through consistent TDD adoption and architectural thinking. Primary gaps are lack of explicit Nest.js, Vitest, and Playwright mentions—learnable given deep Node.js and testing fundamentals—plus missing Python and secondary database experience.
strengths: 15+ years full-stack senior experience with direct TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB expertise matching core stack
Current Staff role building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks, directly aligned with job's AI development requirement
Proven software craftsmanship and testing discipline through multiple roles emphasizing TDD, CI/CD, and architectural decision-making
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience despite strong Node.js background; framework is primary in job description and assumes existing knowledge
Testing frameworks Vitest and Playwright not mentioned; resume emphasizes testing mindset but lacks enumeration of specific tools
Python not listed in skills section and no explicit PostgreSQL/MySQL relational database experience documented

key_factors.factor: Core tech stack mastery (TypeScript, Node.js, React, NoSQL/cloud)
Current AI-agent infrastructure work matching emerging job requirement
Nest.js and specific testing framework gaps
